section.heading: Equitable distribution of funds
section.chapeau: In awarding grants under this subchapter, the Attorney General shall distribute funds in a manner that—

paragraph.content: equitably addresses the needs of underserved populations, including rural and tribal communities; and

paragraph.chapeau: focuses on communities that have been disproportionately impacted by opioid abuse as evidenced in part by—

subparagraph.content: high rates of primary treatment admissions for heroin and other opioids;
high rates of drug poisoning deaths from heroin and other opioids; and
a lack of accessibility to treatment providers and facilities and to emergency medical services.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 90–351, title I, § 3024, as added Pub. L. 114–198, title II, § 201(a)(1), July 22, 2016, 130 Stat. 713.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 3797ff–3 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
